sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_modulo (a Int32, b Int32, result Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_modulo (a, b, result) VALUES (10, 3, 10 % 3);
UPDATE test_modulo SET result = a % b WHERE a > 0;
SELECT a, b, result FROM test_modulo WHERE result = a % b;
INSERT INTO test_modulo (a, b, result) VALUES (15, 4, 15 % 4), (22, 6, 22 % 6);
